;<span id="Registry">registry</span>
:sorted set of named [[Glossary:Registry_object|objects]] (called [[Glossary:Registry_member|registry members]]) that are used in creating [[Glossary:Element|elements]] in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]. [[Glossary:Registry_object|Objects]] stored in '''registries''' may have the form of text, HTML file, image, sound, video, font, executable program, DLL, PDF file, etc. You can link particular [[Glossary:Registry_object|objects]] with [[Glossary:Component|components]] in [[Glossary:Element|elements]] by means of '''[[Component menu#Links|Links]] : [[Component menu#Registry_member|Registry member]]''' (''Shift+Ctrl+K'') on the [[component menu]]. Upon choosing the appropriate object name in the '''registry''', choose '''Accept''' and the [[Glossary:Registry_object|object]] will appear within the selected [[Glossary:Component|component]]. '''Important!''' '''Registries''' in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]] have nothing to do with the Windows registry (SuperMemo have been using '''registries''' before the release of Windows 95)! Read more: [[Using registries|Registries]]
